title: anisora angulata
intro: Anisora angulata, also known as the Anisodontea scabrosa, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antiviral properties. Anisora angulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
